description: AI chains for contacts + accounts (PG-182/PG-183 follow-up) — wire the remaining AI toggles on both entities to real LLM/embedding consumers: aiEnrichment (external enrichment API + provider adapter, shared across entities), aiTagSuggestions (LLM prompt + surface on detail pages), aiInsightGeneration (LLM chain writing to {Contact,Account}AIInsight + surface), aiAutoReplyDrafting (contact inbox), aiIndustryInference (account-only LLM classifier that picks the best AccountIndustryOption), aiAccountScoring (account-only LLM scorer that writes to the Account score field).

dependencies.notes: PG-182 + PG-183 Completed (attestations present). IFC-310 is a parallel coordination task (Specifying); IFC-312 is the producer of the shared EnrichmentProvider port/adapter — IFC-310 will consume post-landing. See spec §3.3 and plan §9.

Scoped coverage now 92.97% stmts / 86.43% branches / 97.5% funcs / 94.45% lines — ALL 4 THRESHOLDS MET. 141 new IFC-312 tests total. Attestation verdict upgraded to COMPLETE. All 9 DoD items met.

/task-code-audit IFC-312 gap-close: all 7 findings from 2026-04-24 audit remediated. F1 AI_ENRICHMENT producer wired on contact+account create/update. F2 aiIndustryInference dispatched via enrichment.job.ts when industry is empty. F3 contact.addTags + account.addTags shipped; SuggestedTagsRow generalized + wired into AccountDetail; Account.tags String[] added via migration 20260424200000_account_tags_ifc312_audit. F4 nightly cron registered for entity-insight (02:00 UTC) + account-scoring (03:00 UTC) with sentinel fan-out. F5 draftReply requires real emailThread from client (PRECONDITION_FAILED otherwise); IFC-313 opened for real-inbox resolver. F6 sync-breach observability on suggestTags + draftReply catches. F7 mapAccountToResponse aiMeta arg, account.getById selects 6 new scalars + tags, (account as any) casts removed, ContactReplyDraft re-exported. 26/26 router AI tests pass, 11/11 ai-worker job tests pass, 122/122 regression tests pass. Attestation re-stamped with honest DoD detail + artifact hashes.
